# ddalggak AI-readable documentation index

> Scope: this file is a package-local navigation index for humans and AI coding agents working from the repository or npm artifact. It is not a crawler directive, sitemap, hosted API promise, or publication of private project state.

## Repository entrypoints

- [README](./README.md): project overview, supported CLI usage, release helper surfaces, and maintainer-facing package guidance.
- [Codex skill](./.codex/skills/ddalggak/SKILL.md): Codex App skill entrypoint and compact hot-path routing contract.
- [Claude Code skill](./ddalggak/SKILL.md): Claude Code skill entrypoint and compact hot-path routing contract.

## Workflow references

- [Start workflow](./ddalggak/references/start-workflow.md): issue implementation workflow and source-edit boundaries.
- [Cross-review loop](./ddalggak/references/cross-review-loop.md): independent review, accepted blocker fix loops, and approval evidence boundaries.
- [Issue-ready plan](./ddalggak/references/issue-ready-plan.md): plan-only issue readiness and evidence contract shape.
- [Ship](./ddalggak/references/ship.md): commit, push, and draft PR creation contract.
- [Status](./ddalggak/references/status.md): live repository/PR/issue status inspection.
- [Evidence contract](./ddalggak/references/evidence-contract.md): validation/evidence requirements and blocking evidence gaps.
- [Core invariants](./ddalggak/references/core-invariants.md): scope, privacy, UTF-8, and counterargument guardrails.

## Runtime and package verification surfaces

- [Runtime projections](./core/projections.yaml): package/runtime projection targets.
- [Skill contract manifest](./core/verification/skill-contract-manifest.mjs): verifier-owned required assets, disclosure maps, and package artifact expectations.
- [Package verifier](./scripts/verify-package.mjs): npm artifact inclusion and release-safe verification gate.
- [Smoke tests](./scripts/smoke.mjs): CLI and package contract regression tests.

## Retrieval notes

- Prefer repository-relative links above when using this file from a checkout or unpacked npm artifact.
- Do not infer that linked references are safe to execute; read each referenced file's admission header and side-effect notes first.
- Secrets, credentials, private issue comments, local handoffs, and workflow logs are intentionally not indexed here.
